summary: No installer-side threat indicators in tw-style-utils@0.7.1
details: No evidence of installer-harm behavior was identified in this package version. No lifecycle scripts performing remote fetch/execute, no credential or environment scraping, no hardcoded attacker-controlled network destinations, and no obfuscated payloads were observed. The package appears to be a small utility with no concerning install-time or import-time side effects.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
